pvs.author: seal
pvs.description:
Uh no, I didn't compose this, I just made the video. Anyway, on youtube in all its 720p glory, so if you select 720p and hit the enlarge button it should be good times! 

The song was made with the Nico singer 000。's image in mind, so if you're interested feel free to check out her singing too!
http://www.nicovideo.jp/mylist/13563027

Original on Nico Nico Douga: http://www.nicovideo.jp/watch/sm15875228
Magically better quality on Vimeo: http://vimeo.com/30586541

pvs.author: Magenetra
pvs.description:
Original Title: Absolunote
Original Links: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aWGXyVjjByE http://www.nicovideo.jp/watch/sm15875228 http://piapro.jp/t/wRm0 https://vimeo.com/30586541 

“Each color. Each shape. Each fragrance. Each world. 
Never stained anything, the absolute sound.”

Music, Lyrics: Lemm (@lemm_sounds)
Mastering: Kagome-P
Art: Kigou
Video: Ciel*
Translation: aquariantwin
Subs: Mage

Hi guys, in Japan it is now Miku's birthday, so we are celebrating now! This has been a song I've known about for a long time, and so I wanted to have it translated! I really enjoyed playing it on Project Diva Future Tone, and this PV is beautiful. I hope you guys enjoy this!

Our Tumblr: https://magenetratranslations.tumblr.com 
Our Twitter: https://twitter.com/the_magenetra 
Request songs here: http://www.tricider.com/brainstorming/364tSgQTF47 

We received permission from Lemm to upload this song~
*This upload was made solely for the purpose of expanding the audience of the song and this song does not belong to us, please support the original upload.
Lemm様からの許可を得て投稿しています。
動画についてご質問等がある場合はツイッターまでお願いします。

Lyrics:
ふわふわ溶ける木漏れ日
春風が運ぶ香り
比べてばかりの音階達を
浮かべた空で歌い続けてた
きらきら光る言葉
遠く響く旋律とリズム
歌う私抱きしめて踊り出した
The sunlight filtering through the trees softly melts away
as the wind carries the scent of spring
These scales that only ever bounce off each other
floated in the sky as I continued to sing
As I sang, I held close
the sparkling, shining words of
the distantly-echoing melody and rhythm, and started to dance

幾つもの風が吹く
知らない国の歌
降り注いでは散りばめられていくの
一つ一つ光る中で「私の詩」をウタウ。
Countless winds blow,
singing of an unknown land,
and as they disperse I’ll sing “my song” within their glow,
as they pour onto me one by one.

静かな風ひとつ
A single quiet wind

加護(いら)ない音なんてひとつも無いの
Without a single unneeded (earthly) sound

煌めく時間
淡く染まる五線譜(キャンパス)と音符(雫)
踊る私いつまでも海の底まで沈む様に
This sparkling time
lightly dyes this campus (bar staff) and these drops (notes)
And as I dance, I always feel as though I’m sinking into the depths of the ocean

溜め息は囁きに
傷ついた心は
優しく響く言葉に変えていくの
崩れそうなこの世界で「私の詩」をウタウ。
I’ll change my sighs into a soft voice
and these pains into words
that will gently resonate with someone
and I’ll sing “my song” in this world.
pvs.name: 【Lemm Feat. Hatsune Miku】Absolunote (English Subs)
